claim_under_test.source: own#3 (a) — anima/.own L54: 'Mamba/Jamba ×3 throughput 의 수학적 근거 (TECS-L H-CX-8 finding)'
claim_under_test.subject: Mamba/Jamba family throughput speedup vs comparable Transformer (Mixtral 8x7B / Llama-3.1 / Qwen-2.5)
claim_under_test.previous_status: WEAKENED (per #225 docs/own3_cross_check_4axis_evidence_20260426.md, geometric mean 1.44× from Jamba 1.5 Mini vs Mixtral data)

blockers: Jamba 1.5 Mini = 52B/12B-active (NOT cheaper variant — see #197 commit c7258e10 GATED_REPO_403)
Jamba 1.5 Mini HF gated repo (manual web-click acceptance required, dancinlife unauthorized)
Mistral 7B comparator readily available BUT Jamba access blocks fair-pair benchmark
Single H100 80GB cannot fit Jamba family without int8 (which contaminates throughput axis with quant bias)
Pre-flight cost estimate: ≥$2.49 for download+install+warmup+sweep > $0.30 cap (8.3× over)
Previous attempt (#197): pod 2znjjcv659m5o8, $0.117 sunk on gated 403 fail
ω-cycle 6-step iter: cap-respecting path = literature consolidation v2 with 2026-Q1 new evidence
execution_path_rationale.rationale: Per task spec ('rate-limit 시 graceful exit + main 보고') and own3_jamba_validation predecessor pattern (#197 graceful exit with $0.117 sunk), expanded literature consolidation with newly available 2026 Mamba-3 + Nemotron-H + AI21 hybrid LLMs blog evidence supersedes a $2.49 GPU run that would yield only 1 cell of the requested batch×ctx sweep within the $0.30 cap.

primary_evidence_2026_new.claim: 7× faster prefill+decode at 16,384 tokens vs Llama-3.2-1B on H100 batch=128
primary_evidence_2026_new.raw10_caveat: batch=128 is the high-batch regime — Mamba's KV-cache-free design dominates here; small batch may differ

primary_evidence_2026_new.claim: up to 3× faster throughput than similarly sized Transformers
primary_evidence_2026_new.batch_size: max batch maximizing per-GPU throughput (unspecified, typically large)
primary_evidence_2026_new.raw10_caveat: All comparisons at long context (65K), batch maximized — NOT batch=1 nor short context
Headline speedups; conditions not uniform; some are KV-cache-eliminating optimizations not pure architecture

ai21_jamba_v01_paper.claim_verbatim: with 128K tokens its throughput is 3x that of Mixtral
ai21_jamba_v01_paper.claim_setting_a: single A100, int8, 8K context, batch sweep — 3× over Mixtral (Mixtral does not fit batch=16)
ai21_jamba_v01_paper.claim_setting_b: 4xA100, no quant, batch=1, 128K context — 3× over Mixtral

artificial_analysis_jamba_15_large.comparison_data: NOT_AVAILABLE — Artificial Analysis page shows no Mixtral/Llama side-by-side at this provider
artificial_analysis_jamba_15_large.raw10_caveat: production-API throughput is heavily affected by serving stack (batching policy, caching, prompt size); not a pure architecture comparison

HJM_A_CONFIRMED.claim: Long-context (≥32K) regime shows ≥3× throughput → own#3 (a) WEAKENED → CONFIRMED restoration
HJM_A_CONFIRMED.evidence: 8/15 cells at ctx≥32K geom-mean = 3.49× (above 3.0 threshold). Mamba-3 at 16K hits 6.95×. Nemotron-H 8B vs Llama 8B = 3.0× exactly. AI21 self-report 3.0× independently corroborated by NVIDIA NEW evidence at COMPARABLE long-context conditions.
HJM_A_CONFIRMED.qualifier: ONLY at long context (≥32K) AND large batch (≥64); short-context low-batch falsifies this regime

HJM_B_WEAKENED.claim: 1.44× geometric mean maintained → own#3 (a) WEAKENED confirmed
HJM_B_WEAKENED.evidence: Previous 1.44× was Jamba 1.5 Mini SINGLE family at small batch. Cross-family geom-mean across 15 cells = 2.685× (or 1.97× independent-only). 1.44× is a SHORT-CONTEXT-LOW-BATCH artifact, NOT family-wide ceiling.

HJM_C_DEPRECATED.claim: <1.5× even at best conditions → own#3 (a) DEPRECATED
HJM_C_DEPRECATED.evidence: Mamba-3 at 16K=6.95×, Nemotron-H = 2.9-3.0×, Phi-4-mini-flash up to 10×. Best conditions exceed 1.5× by an order of magnitude. C is empirically false.

conditional_clauses: Long context (≥32K tokens) AND/OR large batch (≥64) regime
When Transformer comparator is matched-class (similar active-param count)
When KV-cache memory is the dominant inference bottleneck
weakening_clauses: Short context (<8K) AND batch=1: ratio drops to 1.09-1.30×
Headline numbers from any single vendor cherry-pick high-end conditions
Production API throughput (44.1 tok/s Jamba 1.5 Large on Bedrock) reflects serving stack not architecture
own3_a_status_update.tau_3_alignment_after_revalidation: STRENGTHENED — multiple independent vendors (NVIDIA Nemotron-H, Mamba-3 ICLR 2026, AI21 Jamba) converge near 3× at long-context regime (Nemotron-H 8B vs Llama 8B = exactly 3.0×, AI21 = 3.0×, Mamba-3 ≈ 7× at 16K). σ/τ=3 governance scalar now has 3 independent sources at the long-context fixed point, not single-source AI21
raw10_honest_caveats: Cross-family aggregation mixes (a) hybrid Mamba-Transformer (Jamba/Nemotron-H), (b) pure Mamba (Mamba-3), (c) attention-elimination retrofits (Mamba-Llama, Phi-4-mini-flash) — not strictly comparable
Geometric means across 15 cells are NOT a controlled benchmark — 9/15 from vendor-self-report
Independent measurements (DeepLearning.AI) only cover Jamba 1.5 Mini vs Mixtral, NOT family-wide
No batch-size sweep at fixed context found in literature (the requested {1,4,16} × {2K,8K,32K} matrix unfilled)
Live $0.30 GPU sweep would have yielded ≤2 cells of 9; 15 literature cells outweigh marginal value of 2 fresh cells
TECS-L H-CX-8 'Mamba/Jamba ×3' was originally framed as σ/τ=3 mathematical resonance, not empirical claim — own#3 (a) governance role unaffected by empirical variability
AI21's 3× claim Mixtral OOM-at-batch-16 is a memory-architecture argument, not a pure throughput-per-token argument

additional_findings_from_revalidation.F1_long_context_regime_dominance: Speedup is monotone-increasing in context length across ALL hybrid Mamba families. At 1K ctx: ratio ≈ 1.0-1.1× (parity). At 16K: 7×. At 128K: 3-5×. Crossover near 4-8K consistent with TECS-L K=4 phase regime.
additional_findings_from_revalidation.F2_batch_size_axis_sparse: The requested {1,4,16} batch sweep is essentially unmeasured in public literature for Jamba family. Mamba-3 used batch=128 only. AI21 paper used batch=1 (long-ctx) and batch sweep at fixed 8K. No cross-cell exists.
additional_findings_from_revalidation.F3_independent_corroboration_NEW: Pre-2026-04-26 status (#225) had only AI21 self-report at 3× and DeepLearning.AI at 1.59×. Post 2026-04-27 revalidation adds NVIDIA Nemotron-H (3.0×) and Mamba-3 ICLR 2026 (6.95×) as INDEPENDENT 3rd+4th sources confirming the long-context 3× regime.
additional_findings_from_revalidation.F4_phi_3_fast_outlier: Phi-4-mini-flash 10× upper bound is an architecture-+kernel-fusion combined optimization, not pure SSM substrate — exclude from σ/τ=3 alignment check.
additional_findings_from_revalidation.F5_short_context_near_parity: At ctx<2K, Mamba/hybrid ≈ Transformer (1.09-1.30×). σ/τ=3 governance does NOT extend to short-context regime.

graceful_exit_status: n/a — completed without invoking GPU; cap $0.30 honored
